title: Business Development Executive (Logistic / Freight)
description:
Key Responsibilities


Business Development and Client Acquisition

  • Identify and develop business opportunities in the logistics and supply chain sector, with a focus on growing cross-border export services.
  • Build and maintain a robust sales pipeline through market research, networking, and lead generation.
  • Possess experience in one of the following key areas:
    Singapore & Southeast Asia Focus: Proven experience in managing export logistics flows within the Southeast Asia corridor (e.g., Singapore-Malaysia, Singapore-Indonesia).
    Global Markets Focus: In-depth knowledge of logistics protocols and requirements for key international trade lanes such as Asia-Pacific (e.g., Japan-Korea, ANZ) or Europe-America, with a proven ability to optimize client supply chains for cost and efficiency.

Client Relationship Management

  • Proactively maintain and strengthen relationships with existing clients through regular follow-ups and highly responsive support, ensuring their ongoing satisfaction.
  • Point of contact between the company and the client, deeply understanding their challenges in cross-border exports to deliver comprehensive, end-to-end logistics solutions.
  • Design competitive service proposals tailored to client needs for routes to Southeast Asia, Japan-Korea, Europe-America, and Australia-New Zealand.

Sales Strategy and Planning

  • Develop and implement effective sales strategies to achieve and exceed sales targets.
  • Design differentiated sales approaches for various regional markets (e.g., Southeast Asia, Europe-America) to enhance the market penetration of the company's logistics services.

Market Analysis and Insight

  • Closely monitor international logistics industry trends and competitor activities to identify potential opportunities and risks in the cross-border export sector.
  • Provide regular market feedback to the management team to support strategic decision-making for key routes (e.g., Singapore-Malaysia, Japan-Korea, Europe-America).

Sales Reporting and Management

  • Prepare and submit regular sales reports, including sales forecasts, client feedback, and market trend analysis.
  • Utilize CRM tools proficiently to efficiently manage customer interactions and the sales process.

Negotiation and Contract Management

  • Negotiate terms and conditions with clients to secure profitable and sustainable business partnerships.
  • Ensure the accuracy and timeliness of all relevant documentation (e.g., transport agreements, customs clearance documents).

postedCompany.description:
SF was established in Shunde, Guangdong Province in 1993. On December 12, 2016, SF was approved to be listed in A-Share stock market by the China Securities Regulatory Commission; on February 24, 2017, SF had been officially renamed to SF Holding (SZSE:002352) .

SF is one of the leading integrated express logistics service providers in China. After years of development, SF has built up a preliminary level of capability for providing customers with one-stop integrated logistics solutions including warehousing management, sales forecasting, big data analysis, and financial management.

SF is an intelligent logistics provider with the advantage of network scale.SF has built an integrated logistics networks of “Aviation Network”, “Ground Network” and “Information Network”, after years of concentration at business operation, and forward-looking strategic planning.


https://www.sf-international.com/sg/en/
postedCompany.name: S. F. EXPRESS (SINGAPORE) PRIVATE LIMITED

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
